title: Drone Intrusions Near Airports
description: Multiple drones are spotted near major airports, grounding flights.

C.title: Pause flights until threat is assessed

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Anti-drone systems are essential. Airports have lost millions because authorities hesitated.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Jamming systems risk interfering with civilian tech. We shouldn’t rush into militarizing airports.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: A single drone can down a plane. We can’t gamble with lives.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then increase penalties — don’t blanket-jam the airwaves.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Penalties don’t stop bad actors. Technology does.
